mapper.sql: select t.oper_id, t.title, t.business_type, t.method, t.request_method, t.operator_type, t.oper_name, t.dept_name, t.oper_url, t.oper_ip, t.oper_location, t.oper_param, t.json_result, t.status, t.error_msg, t.oper_time, t.oper_user_id, t.oper_user_security_id, t.oper_user_security_name, t.oper_object_security_name, t.oper_object_security_id, t.oper_object_id, t.oper_object_name, t.oper_user_security_value, t.oper_object_security_value from sys_oper_log t
mapper.select: select column_name prop,column_comment label from gen_table_column where table_id = (select table_id from gen_table where table_name= #{tableName})
select oper_pre_param oldData,oper_after_param newData,oper_id from sys_oper_params where oper_id=#{operId}
